meta.title: Veloadout — Bikepacking Gear Volume Calculator
meta.description: Calculate the total volume of your bikepacking gear and get bag recommendations.

hero.title: Know your load before you go
hero.subtitle: Add your gear, we calculate the volume. Instantly know which bags you need.

bags.no_active_bags: No active bags — enable at least one above
bags.overflow_total: Total gear exceeds your bag capacity

welcome.title: New here? Welcome
welcome.body: Search for specific products (e.g. "Thermarest NeoAir XLite"), pick a size, and we'll suggest which bags fit your total volume.

help.title: How to use Veloadout
help.intro: Veloadout helps you calculate how much packed volume your bikepacking gear takes up — so you know exactly which bags fit your setup before you start packing.
help.step_1: Add gear by typing a product name in the search bar (e.g. "Thermarest NeoAir XLite"). The app finds it in the database or asks Claude AI to look up the packed volume from the web.
help.step_2: For products with multiple sizes (Regular / Long / Wide), pick the size you own before adding it to your list.
help.step_3: Don't know an exact product? Use the preset panel — quick-add buttons for typical items like sleeping bags, tents, jackets, with realistic average volumes.
help.step_4: Check the bag recommendation panel — it suggests how to distribute your total volume across handlebar, frame, and seat packs.
help.search_body: Search works best with specific product names, not generic terms. "MSR Hubba Hubba 2P" gives a precise volume; "tent" doesn't. If the AI didn't find all sizes, click "Search the web more thoroughly" to dig deeper.
help.account_body: Sign in via magic link (email, no password) to save your gear list across devices. Without an account, your list lives only in this browser tab.
help.tip_1: Volumes are packed/compressed sizes, not unpacked. A sleeping bag in its stuff sack, not lofted out.
help.tip_2: All numbers are estimates. For trip-critical gear, verify against manufacturer specs.
help.tip_3: Found something missing? Sign in and search — confirmed AI results are saved to the shared catalog for everyone.

share.share_description: Create a public link so anyone can view your gear list. Read-only — they can't change anything.
share.anyone_can_see: Anyone with this link can see the list.
share.shared_description: A public bikepacking gear list shared via Veloadout.

feedback.title: Help us improve the data
feedback.correct_volume: Correct volume (L), if you know it
feedback.correct_weight: Correct weight (g), if you know it
feedback.comment_placeholder: What did you find? Link to manufacturer spec helps a lot.
feedback.anonymous_ok: No sign-in needed — feedback is anonymous if you're not logged in.
feedback.need_something: Add a comment or a corrected value.

footer.text: Volume data is crowd-sourced and AI-assisted. Always verify critical gear specs.
footer.affiliate_disclosure: As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. Outbound product links may be affiliate links.

errors.load_failed: Could not load your list. Please refresh.
errors.save_failed: Could not save your list. Please try again.

cookies.description: We use only essential cookies for authentication. No tracking, no ads.
